latHint: Think Christmas carols and "O Come All Ye Faithful."
pivHint: LOVE isn't just a feeling Paul commands here. It's also the word you'd use for someone you can't stop thinking about, someone you treasure above all else. What's a stronger word for that?
winText: You found it. To LOVE deeply is to ADORE - and Paul says bear with one another in LOVE, the same LOVE that adores without condition.
lossText: The word was ADORE. LOVE was the pivot - what Paul commands in Ephesians, and the deeper word for LOVE that holds nothing back.
votdVerse: Be completely humble and gentle; be patient, bearing with one another in love.
passageText: As a prisoner for the Lord, then, I urge you to live a life worthy of the calling you have received. Be completely humble and gentle; be patient, bearing with one another in love. Make every effort to keep the unity of the Spirit through the bond of peace.
